category_sources: Official README describes it as a Google Cloud Storage emulator and testing library.
source_facts.description says fake-gcs-server is an emulator for the Google Cloud Storage API.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is `fake-gcs-server`; official README heading uses `fake-gcs-server`.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface and includes Docker, flags, environment variables, and client examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides the official repository; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README says it can be used as a Go library, standalone binary, and Docker image for tests.
source_facts.description identifies a Google Cloud Storage API emulator.
